creator: lioux@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks! 

However, maintainership was assigned to Patrick Li <pat@databits.net> 
who submitted the port first in pvt email. 

Most of the port came from Patrick Li but pkg-descr came from the PR. 

Please, keep coming with such good PRs, the 2 submissions were 
mostly alike.
